description: Composition Printed green sleeveless kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round slit neck, green piping along the armholes, black, mustard and green yoke, and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only Wear art wherever you go! The tri-colour shading and print blend perfectly togather in this sleeveless kurta from aneri, making this a fab buy. Crafted from silk in stylish cuts, this kurta offers exemplary comfort and is sure to elevate into a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings or patialas and chunky earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
